title: Mod Collection
description: A collection of mods with a tech-like direction
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f35b937bd2cbe47e1c1623400b9056288430381.png)

---

**Recommended RAM: 4gb or more**

**Min. RAM: 3gb**

Mod Collection is a Modpack meant to have a techy-like touch but also being able to run on lower-end PCs.
Of course this Modpack also includes an end game item: will you craft the **Mod Collection Star**?

This Modpack includes:
- **160+ Mods**
- **new decorations (Another Furniture, Supplementaries, ...)**
- **new biomes to explore (BOP, ...)**
- **new animals and companions (Alex's Mobs and Companions & Critters)**
- **SPACE (Ad Astra)**
- **automation (Create, Industrial Foregoing, ...)**
- **energy generation (Mekanism, TFMG, Powah!, ...)**
- **food (Farmer's Delight and its Add-ons, ...)**
- **and some more!**

Do you have an issue or a feature request? Go to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Command17/Mod-Collection-Modpack/issues)!
